mapper.insert: INSERT INTO qbank_exam_paper (examTypeId, examSubjectId, title, timeLimitMin, isActive) VALUES (#{examTypeId}, #{examSubjectId}, #{title}, #{timeLimitMin}, #{isActive})
mapper.update: UPDATE qbank_exam_paper SET examTypeId = #{examTypeId}, examSubjectId = #{examSubjectId}, title = #{title}, timeLimitMin = #{timeLimitMin}, isActive = #{isActive} WHERE id = #{id}
